{{Quote|Tagta is a businessman ''first'', a merciless crime lord ''second''!|Tagta the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="The Guns of Nar Hekka">{{TCWComicCite|6.13|The Guns of Nar Hekka}}</ref>}}
'''Tagta''' the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] was a member of the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] clan. He was cousin to, and subordinate of, [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron|Jiliac]]

==Biography==
Tagta had his [[Tagta the Hutt's palace|palace]] located on the cold planet [[Nar Hekka]], in the farther reaches of the [[Y'Toub system/Legends|Y'Toub system]].

He was responsible for referring [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to Jiliac and [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] in [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], after Han successfully transferred a ship with lucrative cargo from [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] to Nar Hekka.

{{Char-stub}}
